general.description: Given a scene graph query (a set of objects and their spatial/semantic relationships), this demo retrieves the most relevant images from a pre-indexed test dataset using a CRF-based scoring pipeline.

params.label: Objects (comma-separated)
params.comments: List the objects you want to search for, separated by commas. Example: person, horse, tree

params.label: Relationships (optional)
params.comments: Define relationships between objects using their 0-based index from the list above. Format per entry: subj_index predicate obj_index — separate multiple with commas. Example: '0 on 1, 0 next_to 2' means person-on-horse and person-next_to-tree. Leave empty for an object-only search.
